channel.title: Sysadmin on harkx
channel.description: Recent content in Sysadmin on harkx

item.title: VMware vSphere Client downloads
item.description: For future reference, here are all the VMware vSphere Client downloads: Download URLs for vSphere Client written by @harkx

item.title: Running Odoo with https
item.description: It has gotten so easy to use https since https://letsencrypt.org/ opened up. Not only can you get free ssl certificates but even more important, automate the process! That’s how it should be! I’m using Caddy. I’m assuming your Odoo server is already running. (for example, on 127.0.0.1:8069) Also important, some requirements: DNS is configured correctly, pointing to your (Caddy/Odoo) server If incorrect, generating the certificates will not work!

item.title: Go, build for a different architecture
item.description: It happened that I needed to (re)build a small program for an i386 machine. This was about the same time I realized we still had those… It’s very easy but since I’ll not be using this a lot I wanted to document it. First of all, build the correct Go compiler. I’m on (Ubuntu) amd64 and these instructions explain how to get the i386 build. (you can replace all (i)386 with amd64 to do the reverse.

item.title: Cheat Sheets
item.description: The homepage of Cheatography not only has a nice collection but you can also generate and share your own cheat sheets. Some of my favorites: tmux - the best terminal multiplexer rsync - a pretty long list bash - Bash Linux command line keyboard shortcuts perlcheat - for beginning Perl programmers holiday/vacations - enjoy your trip.. written by @harkx
